name: Assiniok

sheet.name: Assiniok
sheet.background_story:
Although the Arcane Council consists of three members to maintain the balance of power, The eldest of the Council, Assiniok, holds the greatest influence for he was the first to enter the council and has secret knowledge Urethmel and Woelmur do not...  

He is one of great pride of the position he holds in the Arcane Council and is the primary voice of the Council. 

His desire to grow the reach of the Arcane Council outside of its bound grows with each passing cycle...
